case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. MIGUEL A. MAY CANUL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2012 - CONTINUED TO JUN-26-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR ON JUNE 26, 2012 AT 10:00 AM TO ADVISE THE COURT THE STATUS OF THE CASE. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
